title: Skill Frontmatter
description: JSON Schema for SKILL.md frontmatter fields (compatible with ClawHub).

name.description: Unique skill identifier. Must match the parent directory name. Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.

description.description: What the skill does and when to use it. This is the primary trigger mechanism — include both what the skill does and the specific contexts in which it should activate.
examples: Supabase database best practices for schema design, RLS policies, indexing, and query optimization. Use when working with Supabase projects, writing PostgreSQL migrations, configuring Row Level Security, or optimizing database performance.

license.description: License name (e.g., 'MIT') or path to a bundled license file.

metadata.description: Arbitrary key-value pairs for additional skill information such as author, version, organization, or date.

examples.author: supabase
examples.abstract: Comprehensive guide for Postgres performance optimization.
